issue_summary: One massive /subscriptions page still rendered: subnav + page header + Cycle 005 ink hero + Cycle 005 OutcomesView + SourceHealthView + Cycle 002 AnalyticsView + Cycle 001 ModuleShell stacked vertically
support_user_impact: Page reads as 6+ subscription dashboards stacked; same metrics restated under different headings; >2 viewports tall on 1440px
recommended_fix: Migrate panels into IA v2 subpages; unmount everything not on Command Center; legacy panels move to /subscriptions/diagnostics or are retired

issue_summary: Footer line 'Legacy sections kept mounted for regression coverage' visible with History+GitBranch icons
support_user_impact: CS agent sees engineering vocabulary and assumes dashboard is broken or unfinished
recommended_fix: Delete the line; replace with 'Open diagnostic / advanced view' Diagnostics drawer entry-point

issue_summary: Two heroes on the same subpage: Cycle 007 SubscriptionPageHeader and Cycle 005 surface-ink hero band immediately below
support_user_impact: Eye does not know which is the page title; two competing page promises
recommended_fix: Remove Cycle 005 surface-ink band from Command Center; subscription page header is the only hero

issue_summary: Two scenario chip rows expose demo-state toggles to end users (4 in OutcomesView; 2 in AnalyticsView)
support_user_impact: Non-technical agent thinks scenarios are real filters that change live data; option sets disagree
recommended_fix: Hide scenario toggles in production UI; keep RBAC-gated dev-only Diagnostics drawer for QA

issue_summary: Section titles 'Cycle 002 contract-wired view' and 'Cycle 001 dashboard module shell' shown in production UI
support_user_impact: Customer-facing dashboard reads like an internal release note
recommended_fix: Retire labels; if panels remain in Cycle 008 they move to Diagnostics with neutral copy. Cycle 00N / Wave 00N banned

issue_summary: analytics-api / contract / fixture / shape mismatch / shared-contract preview shown as user-facing strings
support_user_impact: Engineering vocabulary leaks; users cannot act on 'shape mismatch'
recommended_fix: Replace with single 'system status' chip with three friendly states (live / fallback-no-permission / fallback-api-down)

issue_summary: No global advanced filter drawer; topbar exposes only Date/Platform/Segment chips
support_user_impact: Support lead cannot answer key workflows ('which calls were Cost Too High that we saved'); forces export-to-Excel
recommended_fix: Ship Advanced filter drawer per IA wireframe spec §3 with backend-gap-aware disabled states

issue_summary: No real export UX; only disabled prototype 'Export this view · planned' button on Cycle 007 page header
support_user_impact: 'What can I export for my manager?' workflow does not exist
recommended_fix: Ship Export drawer per IA wireframe spec §4: page-header export, per-widget kebab, per-row export, /subscriptions/export-audit

issue_summary: Subnav advertises 'Follow-Up · 3' attention badge but tab is disabled (status:planned)
support_user_impact: Dashboard advertises 3 calls need a human and offers no way to act on it
recommended_fix: Ship /subscriptions/follow-up with read-only operator table; until then remove the attention badge

issue_summary: No active filter chip strip, no saved views, no comparison period control
support_user_impact: User cannot see what they filtered to; cannot compare today vs last week
recommended_fix: Ship chip strip / saved views drawer / comparison-period control per IA spec §3 §3.3 §3.4

issue_summary: Top-level page titles flat / engineering-flavoured ('Cross-platform support intelligence', 'RBAC, exports, and audit controls')
support_user_impact: 'RBAC' / 'contracts' / 'intelligence' are jargon; do not answer 'what am I looking at'
recommended_fix: Retitle pages to questions per plain-language copy guide

issue_summary: Sidebar footer shows 'v0.9 · cycle 006' and 'no-drift' pill
support_user_impact: 'cycle 006' and 'no-drift' are internal vocabulary
recommended_fix: Remove cycle text; replace 'no-drift' with 'Source-of-truth lock' + tooltip; version moves to hover-only

issue_summary: Topbar 'No-drift enforced' pill
support_user_impact: 'No-drift' is internal data-engineering term; reads like a railway notice
recommended_fix: Replace with 'Trusted definitions on' + tooltip explaining the rulebook

issue_summary: Eyebrow + section-header repetition fatigue; 5+ eyebrows visible above the fold on /subscriptions
support_user_impact: Page reads as 'important things shouting at me' with no clear hierarchy
recommended_fix: Cap visible eyebrows above the fold per subpage at 2; treat eyebrow as honour not default

issue_summary: Color usage busy: violet/indigo/emerald/rose/amber/sky/cyan/slate co-rendered
support_user_impact: User cannot tell what colour means; rose = bad? rose = cancellation (normal)?
recommended_fix: Adopt single semantic palette: emerald healthy, amber pending, rose blocked-only; outcome categories use neutral slate cards

issue_summary: Overview page title 'Cross-platform support intelligence' is vague
support_user_impact: CS agent does not learn what to do
recommended_fix: Retitle: 'Today across all support channels' / 'What changed in support today?'

issue_summary: Overview hero treatment identical to subscription page
support_user_impact: User cannot tell which module they are looking at; every page reads as priority
recommended_fix: Subscription module retains boldest treatment; other modules use lighter surface-card hero

issue_summary: KPI trend deltas use copy 'Awaiting first confirmed window'
support_user_impact: 'first confirmed window' is jargon
recommended_fix: Replace with 'We need at least one full week of data before we can show a trend'

issue_summary: Em-dash placeholder + eyebrow 'Preview value · awaiting live contract'
support_user_impact: User does not know what dash means; 'live contract' is engineering vocabulary
recommended_fix: Replace with 'Live data starts here once the source is wired' + ? tooltip

issue_summary: No 'needs attention' panel on Overview; metrics-only
support_user_impact: Executive sees green numbers; support lead does not know what is broken
recommended_fix: Add 'Across the day' aggregated action card linking to each module's follow-up queue

issue_summary: KPI grid mixes counts and rates on one canvas with mixed visual treatments (6-card count grid + 3-card rate grid with violet gradient + ambient glow + formula chips)
support_user_impact: User cannot tell which is the headline vs detail; two unrelated visual systems compete
recommended_fix: One headline card on Command Center; rate cards move to /subscriptions/outcomes Level 2

issue_summary: data-testid leaks raw metric IDs (subscription_contacts_total, outcome-rate-formula-…)
support_user_impact: Bleeds into copy/paste, screen readers, accessibility scans; feels like code preview
recommended_fix: Keep data-testid for tests; ensure visible label is always human ('Confirmed saves')

issue_summary: 'Stay.ai-confirmed ratio' sub-eyebrow under every rate card
support_user_impact: Authority chip already present in panel header; redundant
recommended_fix: Authority chip on panel header only; remove per-card sub-eyebrow

issue_summary: Formula text '(N / D)' shown as monospace chip on every rate card
support_user_impact: Users do not need algebra to read the rate; raises cognitive bar
recommended_fix: Hover tooltip for formula; Level 2 expander on Outcome Summary

issue_summary: 'Subscription contacts in scope: 245' has unclear unit
support_user_impact: Calls? Customers? Distinct subscriptions? Distinct phone numbers?
recommended_fix: '245 subscription calls in this view' + ? tooltip 'One row per call where the customer asked about their subscription'

issue_summary: Funnel restates 'Source authority: Stay.ai' on every stage row
support_user_impact: Panel header already shows 'Stay.ai-final stages: N'; restating adds visual weight without information
recommended_fix: Authority chip once per panel; mark stages whose authority differs

issue_summary: Funnel encodes share twice (text + bar)
support_user_impact: Redundant; takes two reads to verify they agree
recommended_fix: Keep bar as primary; render share % as hover tooltip

issue_summary: Funnel aria-valuenow on a role=presentation element
support_user_impact: Lighthouse / axe will flag; screen-reader users get role removed but stray aria-valuenow
recommended_fix: Drop aria-valuenow OR change role to progressbar with aria-valuemin/max/now and accessible name

issue_summary: Outcome alerts panel uses two-column grid for short messages
support_user_impact: Severity-ordered reading flow lost; assistive tech ordering disrupted
recommended_fix: Single-column list ordered by severity (danger → warning → info)

issue_summary: Metadata panel renders fingerprint, audit reference, metric IDs, formula version inline on page surface
support_user_impact: Support user has no use for fingerprint; signals 'developer view'; crowds page
recommended_fix: Move to ▾ 'Show metric definitions, formula version, fingerprint, audit reference' expander (Level 2) + 'Open governance drawer' link (Level 3)

issue_summary: Generated at timestamp shown as raw ISO '2026-05-05T19:21:03+00:00'
support_user_impact: Not friendly; time-zone unclear
recommended_fix: 'Updated 12 minutes ago · 5 May at 14:21 ET' + hover for raw ISO

issue_summary: metric_id shown as 'subscription_outcomes_v3.2' on page surface
support_user_impact: User does not need metric ID at Level 1
recommended_fix: Human label 'Subscription outcomes — version 3.2' inside Level 2 expander; raw ID inside Level 3 drawer

issue_summary: Scenario rendered as monospace 'pending_stayai_confirmation'
support_user_impact: Developer state name leaked to page surface
recommended_fix: Translate to friendly description; show only inside Level 2

issue_summary: Fingerprint and audit reference shown as full mono break-all strings
support_user_impact: Signals 'for engineers'; breaks page rhythm with monospace blocks
recommended_fix: Truncate first/last 4 chars at Level 1 with copy-to-clipboard; full string in Level 3 drawer

issue_summary: Authority chip duplicated 3+ times (OutcomesView header + KpiGrid header + MetadataPanel header)
support_user_impact: Source-of-truth lock becomes wallpaper instead of authority signal
recommended_fix: One authority chip per subpage in page header; cards reference it via inline source chips

issue_summary: Cycle 002 SubscriptionFinalStateBanner overlaps semantically with Cycle 005 alerts panel
support_user_impact: User told same warning twice with different copy and visual languages
recommended_fix: Pick one; 'Stay.ai final state pending' state lives on Outcome Summary not Command Center

issue_summary: PortalJourneyPanel/ShopifyContextPanel/SynthflowJourneyPanel/SourceConfirmationPanel/SubscriptionMetricMetadataPanel all rendered with no progressive disclosure
support_user_impact: Five extra context-only panels pad page beyond two viewports; dilute hero metric
recommended_fix: Portal panel moves to /subscriptions/portal-handoff; Shopify/Synthflow journey to /subscriptions/diagnostics; Source-confirmation rolls into page header authority chip + L2 expander

issue_summary: Full SourceHealthView module embedded inside /subscriptions
support_user_impact: Two entry points to source health (sidebar + this in-page section); breaks global IA
recommended_fix: Remove embedded mount; surface as chip on Command Center linking to /data-quality

issue_summary: Subnav prototype description leaks 'IA v2 · 10 focused subpages · Cycle 007 prototype' and a markdown spec path
support_user_impact: Subnav literally points the user at a markdown file path
recommended_fix: No helper paragraph or chip in production; status is 'Coming soon' pill; no file paths

issue_summary: Page-header 'Advanced filters · planned' and 'Export this view · planned' grey buttons
support_user_impact: Users learn page-header buttons do not work and stop trying
recommended_fix: Ship buttons functional in Cycle 008 or do not render them at all

issue_summary: KPI cards do not link anywhere
support_user_impact: User expects clicking 'Confirmed saves: 142' takes them to a list; it does not
recommended_fix: Every KPI card a link to its canonical subpage drilldown

issue_summary: Funnel stages do not link to Cancellation Intake / Cost Too High / Portal+Handoff
support_user_impact: Stage drill-down impossible
recommended_fix: Stages link to subpage that owns upstream/downstream of that step

issue_summary: No business value visible on Command Center despite Agent A shipping /subscriptions/business-value contract
support_user_impact: Workflow #3 'How much money did we save?' not answered
recommended_fix: Render Net Business Value (Confirmed) as 5th KPI on Command Center + dedicated /subscriptions/business-value subpage

issue_summary: No Cost Too High retention funnel visualization
support_user_impact: Workflow #5 'Which offer path is working?' cannot be answered
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/cost-too-high per IA spec §4.1.5

issue_summary: Alerts surface 'Pending Stay.ai final state · N records' but no link to records
support_user_impact: Action surfaced without resolution path
recommended_fix: Alert row becomes CTA → /subscriptions/follow-up?filter=pending_stayai_final_state

issue_summary: No table on /subscriptions; only KPI cards and a funnel
support_user_impact: Workflows #4 and #6 need row-level table
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships operator-facing FollowUpTable on /subscriptions/follow-up

issue_summary: 'Pending Stay.ai final state' / 'outcomes blocked from finalization' assumes user knows what Stay.ai and 'final state' mean
support_user_impact: New CS agents not on-boarded to Stay.ai source-of-truth; cannot interpret 'final state'
recommended_fix: Apply copy guide: 'We do not yet have official subscription confirmation' / first-mention Stay.ai tooltip

issue_summary: Source confirmation pill shows 'pending_stayai_match' enum value
support_user_impact: Code-style enum rendered in a chip
recommended_fix: Translate to 'Awaiting Stay.ai' / 'Confirmed by Stay.ai' / 'Stay.ai confirmation missing'

issue_summary: KPI tone 'pending' uses amber; same colour also used for 'warning' alerts
support_user_impact: Reader cannot tell whether amber means 'pending' (waiting) or 'warning' (alarming)
recommended_fix: Pending uses neutral slate + clock icon; amber = warning only

issue_summary: In pending scenario, page is materially identical to baseline; only counts shift
support_user_impact: User does not understand a meaningful number of calls are stuck
recommended_fix: When pending > threshold, page header switches to tinted 'Action needed today' + CTA

issue_summary: 'Missing Stay.ai final state' is hard-fail but reads as a normal scenario chip; KPIs still render as if live
support_user_impact: Entire dataset unconfirmable; dashboard misleads user
recommended_fix: Hard-fail state replaces Command Center with full-width banner + 'Contact data engineering' CTA + audit reference; KPI cards switch to em-dash with missing-data state label

issue_summary: 'rendering shared-contract preview only' shown as user-facing copy in permission-denied state
support_user_impact: Meaningless to non-engineer; looks like developer leak
recommended_fix: Replace with 'We don't have permission to load live data here. We're showing a frozen sample so you can see the layout. Ask your manager for access.'

issue_summary: permission_denied and error paths use same banner template with different copy
support_user_impact: User cannot tell whether to call IT (network), manager (permissions), or wait (data drift)
recommended_fix: Three distinct banners with different icons and CTAs per copy guide §'system status' rules

issue_summary: Cancellation page does not split intake reasons from outcomes; generic module shell with single funnel + KPIs
support_user_impact: Workflows #1 and #5 cannot be answered without reason breakdown
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/cancellation-intake per IA spec §4.1.4; repurpose /cancellations as top-level overview linking in

issue_summary: Confirmed cancellation page does not surface 'save attempts that failed' or cost-of-loss
support_user_impact: User cannot see where retention is leaking
recommended_fix: Add 'Where we lost them' section linking to /subscriptions/cost-too-high

issue_summary: No reason taxonomy filter on cancellations
support_user_impact: User cannot filter by Cost Too High / Don't need it / Service issue / etc.
recommended_fix: Advanced filter drawer dimension 'Cancellation reason' per IA §8.1

issue_summary: 'Save rate and retention journey' title is meta-language
support_user_impact: Meta-language not operator-language
recommended_fix: Retitle 'Calls we saved' / 'Where we kept the subscription'

issue_summary: Retention page does not link to Cost Too High retention funnel
support_user_impact: No drill-down path to highest-value retention sequence
recommended_fix: Primary card 'Cost Too High retention path' → /subscriptions/cost-too-high

issue_summary: Retention page does not surface offer-cost vs revenue protected
support_user_impact: Net business value of retention invisible
recommended_fix: Add 'Net business value protected' tile sourced from Agent A's /subscriptions/business-value contract

issue_summary: Page title 'Source freshness, contracts, and trust' includes 'contracts'
support_user_impact: 'contracts' is engineering vocabulary
recommended_fix: Retitle 'How fresh is our data?' with sub 'Source freshness, version status, and trust labels'

issue_summary: Source health alerts use technical state names (degraded, stale)
support_user_impact: User cannot interpret 'stale'
recommended_fix: Plain-language: fresh→'On time'; warning→'Slightly delayed'; degraded→'Behind schedule'; stale→'Too old to trust'

issue_summary: LineageConflictPanel renders raw lineage breadcrumbs
support_user_impact: Lineage breadcrumb meaningless to support
recommended_fix: Default Level 1 'Conflict found between Stay.ai and Synthflow on N records'; breadcrumb at Level 2 expander

issue_summary: No operator action queue on data quality
support_user_impact: User cannot tell what to fix today
recommended_fix: Add 'Things to fix today' action list linking to runbooks

issue_summary: Page title 'RBAC, exports, and audit controls' is wrong audience
support_user_impact: 'RBAC' is jargon
recommended_fix: Retitle 'Who can see and export what' with sub 'Roles, exports, and audit trail'

issue_summary: Permission matrix table shows raw role IDs
support_user_impact: Raw role IDs unfriendly
recommended_fix: Human role names with hover for underlying role ID

issue_summary: Audit evidence table is the only place export readiness lives
support_user_impact: Export UX scattered across pages
recommended_fix: Export drawer is canonical UX; Governance keeps audit table referencing the drawer

issue_summary: Governance hero copy does not differentiate from subscription hero
support_user_impact: Subscription module loses visual lead
recommended_fix: Governance hero uses less-aggressive treatment; subscription remains visual lead

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist
support_user_impact: Cannot reach IA-promised view
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/outcomes per IA spec §4.1.2

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist
support_user_impact: Workflow needs separate non-cancellation view
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/non-cancellation per IA spec §4.1.3

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist
support_user_impact: Reason taxonomy view absent
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/cancellation-intake per IA spec §4.1.4

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist
support_user_impact: Highest-value retention sequence absent
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/cost-too-high per IA spec §4.1.5

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist; Agent A's contract not surfaced
support_user_impact: 'How much money did we save?' workflow unanswered
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/business-value per IA spec §4.1.6

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist
support_user_impact: Portal completion vs link-sent confusion not resolvable
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/portal-handoff per IA spec §4.1.7

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist
support_user_impact: True containment KPI invisible
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/containment per IA spec §4.1.8 (blocked_by_data placeholder acceptable)

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist; subnav advertises a follow-up queue with attention badge
support_user_impact: Action queue advertised but unreachable
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/follow-up per IA spec §4.1.9

issue_summary: Subpage does not exist
support_user_impact: Governed export with manifest absent
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/export-audit per IA spec §4.1.10

issue_summary: New home for retired Cycle 001/002 panels does not exist
support_user_impact: Legacy panels still mounted on /subscriptions polluting Command Center
recommended_fix: Cycle 008 ships /subscriptions/diagnostics with retired Cycle 001/002 panels (RBAC-gated)
